memory.recent_lessons_md:
### 2026-05-15 — Summit Day 2 non-event + stagflation regime shift

- Trump-Xi Summit Day 2: zero semiconductor chip export deal. 'No talk of chip exports at the bilateral meeting.' Grand ceremony, no material tech deliverables.
- Macro regime shift: 10yr yield +10bps to 4.56% (highest in ~1yr), 30yr at 5.1%, WTI >$100, rate hike prob jumped from 1% to 45%. STAGFLATION risk elevated.
- Chips sold off 3-7% (NVDA -3.6%, AMD -4.2%, INTC -7%). XLE +3% (energy wins stagflation). GLD -2.9% (real yield surge headwind).
- Portfolio -0.11% vs SPY -1.14% = +1.03 pp outperformance today. First significant outperformance day — from defensive cash position, not alpha.
- GLD lesson: gold is NOT a pure inflation hedge. Rising real yields (nominal yield up faster than inflation expectations) = gold headwind. Monitor stop (4.52% cushion).
- NVDA earnings Tuesday May 20 is the dominant next event. Pre-earnings partial exit (5-7 of 15 shares) strongly recommended Monday.

### 2026-05-14 — Trump-Xi Day 1 + record markets

- NVDA +4.54% (Jensen Huang at summit). Markets at all-time records. AMD unfilled x4.
- JPM -1.52% despite record market — financials soft on no-cuts thesis.
- PLTR to $133.40 (+2.62%) — near $134 re-entry but not triggered.

### 2026-05-13 — PPI shock + PLTR support break

- PPI +1.4% vs +0.5% expected — largest monthly jump since 2022. Market rose anyway (tech-led).
- PLTR -4.31% ($134 support broken). Technical dropped to 3. Correct skip.
- AMD pullback to $448. RSI normalized. Re-score 7.33. Must enter.
- 7th consecutive API block. AMD MOC attempted — HTTP 403.

market.macro_notes_md:
- **Stagflation regime (NEW):** CPI 3.8% YoY + PPI +6% YoY + WTI >$100 + 10yr yield 4.56% + rate hike prob 45%. Regime change from pure AI-bull.
- **Trump-Xi Summit concluded:** Zero semiconductor chip export agreement. No material tech sector deliverables. Strategic stability framework only.
- **NVDA earnings May 20 (Tuesday):** 3 calendar days. 2 trading days (Mon+Tue). Pre-earnings partial exit decision critical Monday.
- **Strait of Hormuz:** WTI >$100. National avg gasoline >$4.50. Persistent inflation driver. XLE = stagflation winner.
- **Bitcoin:** Below $79,000. Yield spike + risk-off. Re-entry at $82K+ still required.
- **Fed:** Rate hike probability 45% for sometime in 2026 (was 1% one month ago). No cuts until 2027 at earliest. Headwind for growth/duration.
